main.c(3) Library Functions Manual main.c(3)

NAME

main.c

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int acds_main (void)
ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point.

Function Documentation

int acds_main (void )

ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point. Expects options already parsed and shared initialization complete. Called by main.c mode dispatcher after options_init() and asciichat_shared_init().

Returns

Exit code (0 = success, non-zero = error)

Definition at line 279 of file discovery-service/main.c.

279                     {
280   session_server_like_config_t config = {
281       // Required callbacks
282       .init_fn = acds_init_fn,
283       .init_user_data = NULL,
284       .interrupt_fn = acds_interrupt_fn,
285 
286       // Cleanup
287       .cleanup_fn = acds_cleanup_fn,
288       .cleanup_user_data = NULL,
289 
290       // No status screen for ACDS (for now)
291       .status_fn = NULL,
292       .status_user_data = NULL,
293 
294       // TCP handler
295       .tcp_handler = acds_client_handler,
296       .tcp_user_data = &g_server,
297 
298       // WebSocket
299       .websocket =
300           {
301               .enabled = true,
302               .handler = acds_websocket_client_handler,
303               .user_data = &g_server,
304           },
305 
306       // mDNS
307       .mdns =
308           {
309               .enabled = true,
310               .service_name = "ascii-chat-Discovery-Service",
311               .service_type = "_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp",
312           },
313 
314       // UPnP
315       .upnp =
316           {
317               .enabled = true,
318               .description = "ascii-chat ACDS",
319           },
320 
321       // System
322       .raise_fd_limit = true,
323       .fd_limit_target = 65536,
324   };
325 
326   return session_server_like_run(&config);
327 }




References acds_client_handler(),
    acds_websocket_client_handler(), and
    session_server_like_run().
